entry.title: New: RES25-244 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO TAKE THE STEPS NECESSARY TO ACQUIRE REAL PROPERTY IDENTIFIED AS TAX MAP KEY 7-4-001:025 (WHICH INCLUDES REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 525 AND 535 AVOCADO STREET AND STRUCTURES THEREON) IN WAHIAWĀ, OʻAHU, INCLUDING, IF NECESSARY, THE PREPARATION OF A RESOLUTION FOR THE COUNCIL TO INITIATE PROCEEDINGS IN EMINENT DOMAIN.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
